channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us

item.title: The wife of a Wisconsin kayaker who faked his own death moves to end their marriage
item.description: The wife of a Wisconsin kayaker who faked his own drowning so he could abscond to Europe has filed a court action to end the couple's marriage.
item.dc:creator: Todd Richmond, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: WarnerBros. Discovery announces major corporate restructure
item.description: Media conglomerate WarnerBros. Discovery (WBD) announced a major restructuring of its business on Thursday, splitting its linear and streaming arms into two separate companies as it eyes potential mergers and acquisitions in the coming year.
item.dc:creator: Dominick Mastrangelo, KRON4

item.title: Trump invites China's Xi to his inauguration even as he threatens massive tariffs on Beijing
item.description: WEST PALM BEACH, Fla. (AP) — President-elect Donald Trump has invited Chinese President Xi Jinping to attend his inauguration next month — extending a diplomatic olive branch even as Trump threatens to levy massive tariffs on Chinese goods.
item.dc:creator: AAMER MADHANI, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Build-to-rent homes popping up at faster pace as buyers are priced out
item.description: Companies are maximizing on a tough housing market by building neighborhoods of single-family homes to rent rather than to sell.
item.dc:creator: Ashley Soriano, NewsNation

item.title: Judge declares mistrial in Jimmie 'Jay' Lee murder trial after jury deadlocks
item.description: OXFORD, Miss. — Just before 8:30 p.m. Wednesday, a judge declared a mistrial in the murder trial for University of Mississippi student Jimmie "Jay" Lee. The jury said it could not reach a verdict after more than nine hours. The judge said a new venue may be needed for a new trial.
item.dc:creator: Megan Fayard, NewsNation

item.title: FBI Director announces his resignation
item.description: FBI Director Christopher Wray announced he will resign before President-elect Donald Trump takes office next year and before the end of his 10-year-term.
item.dc:creator: Vinay Simlot, WGN 9

item.title: Bill Belichick, University of North Carolina at Chapel Hill finalize coaching deal: reports
item.description: Bill Belichick has reportedly been tapped as the next head coach for the University of North Carolina at Chapel Hill.
item.dc:creator: Brayden Stamps, ABC 4

item.title: Proposed 'Trump' law seeks to allow felons to run for office in Missouri
item.description: A Missouri representative is proposing a repeal of a state law that currently prevents citizens with a felony history from running for a state office.
item.dc:creator: Megan Mueller, KRON4

item.title: Bill Clinton says he’s open to talking to Biden about preemptive pardon for Hillary Clinton
item.description: Former President Bill Clinton said he is open to having a conversation with President Joe Biden about a potential preemptive pardon for his wife, former Secretary of State Hillary Clinton.
item.dc:creator: Lauren Irwin, WGN 9

item.title: Trump again named Time's Person of the Year
item.description: President-elect Donald Trump rang the opening bell Thursday at the New York Stock Exchange after being recognized for the second time by Time magazine as its Person of the Year.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Drones' reign of terror gripping Americans reaches fever pitch and more top headlines
item.description: Get all the stories you need-to-know from the most powerful name in news delivered first thing every morning to your inbox.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Calmer winds and rising humidity help firefighters battle Malibu blaze
item.description: Calmer winds and rising humidity in Southern California should help firefighters as they climb through steep canyons to battle a blaze that’s driven thousands out of Malibu.
item.dc:creator: Christopher Weber, Jae C. Hong And Gabriela Aoun Angueira, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Secretly recorded videos are backbone of corruption trial for longest-serving legislative leader
item.description: CHICAGO (AP) — Hours of secretly recorded videos and phone calls have offered a rare glimpse into how the longest-serving legislative leader in American history operated behind closed doors.
item.dc:creator: SOPHIA TAREEN, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Key details about the man accused of killing UnitedHealthcare's CEO
item.description: The man accused of killing the head of one of the biggest U.S. health insurance companies is fighting being sent to face charges in New York City, where the attack happened.
item.dc:creator: MARYCLAIRE DALE and SARAH BRUMFIELD, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Joe Burrow's home broken into during Monday Night Football
item.description: Bengals quarterback Joe Burrow's home was broken into during Monday Night Football in the latest home invasion of a pro athlete in the U.S., authorities said Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: DA suggests unusual idea for halting Trump’s hush money case while upholding his conviction
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Eager to preserve President-elect Donald Trump ’s hush money conviction even as he returns to office, prosecutors are suggesting various ways forward — including one based on how some courts handle criminal cases when defendants die. Trump’s spokesperson called the ideas “pathetic.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL R. SISAK and JENNIFER PELTZ, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Oregon federal judge temporarily blocks proposed Kroger-Albertsons merger
item.description: Oregon was one of several states to join the Federal Trade Commission’s lawsuit that aimed to block the merger.
item.dc:creator: Jashayla Pettigrew, KRON4

item.title: Utah's household debt jumps over $1B in 3 months -- here's where we rank nationally
item.description: From Q2 to Q3 of 2024, Utah's total household debt increased by more than $1 billion — here's where Utah ranks compared to the rest of the country.
item.dc:creator: Trevor Myers, ABC 4

item.title: Mangione family in Maryland: What we know
item.description: Although many people outside of Maryland came to know the "Mangione" name only after the arrest of Luigi Mangione, 26, who is accused of killing UnitedHealthcare CEO Brian Thompson, the family has a number of prominent ties to the state where he grew up.
item.dc:creator: Brian Farrell, Fox 5

item.title: Customer recalls moment Luigi Mangione spotted in Pennsylvania McDonald's
item.description: New details are emerging about what happened at the Altoona, Pennsylvania McDonald's where police arrested Luigi Mangione, the suspect in the killing of UnitedHealthcare's CEO, on Monday.
item.dc:creator: Jeremy Tanner, Fox 5

item.title: Las Vegas judge dismisses infamous 'Black Widow' murder case after 27 years
item.description: The judge dismissed murder charges against Margaret Rudin, the woman dubbed "The Black Widow" who a jury convicted of killing her husband more than two decades ago.
item.dc:creator: David Charns, Fox 5

item.title: 2 bodies recovered amid debris from a fishing boat that reportedly capsized in Alaska
item.description: JUNEAU, Alaska (AP) — Two bodies have been recovered amid debris from a fishing boat that reportedly capsized with five people aboard in rough seas in waters off southeast Alaska earlier this month.
item.dc:creator: BECKY BOHRER, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Santa’s home is on Zillow, and you can take an AI-powered tour
item.description: You can take an AI-powered tour of Santa’s home, and you can even decorate your home like Santa with these festive décor ideas.
item.dc:creator: Christina Marfice, KTLA 5

item.title: McConnell receives medical attention after falling
item.description: Senate Republican Leader Mitch McConnell (Ky.) received medical attention after falling following a Republican lunch meeting Tuesday. A spokesman for McConnell said the GOP leader tripped after the lunch. "He sustained a minor cut to the face and sprained his wrist.
item.dc:creator: Al Weaver, Fox 5

item.title: Details emerge about suspect charged with murder in killing of UnitedHealthcare CEO
item.description: ALTOONA, Pa. (AP) — The suspect in the killing of UnitedHealthcare’s CEO likely was motivated by his anger with what he called “parasitic” health insurance companies and a disdain for corporate greed, a law enforcement bulletin obtained by The Associated Press said.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL R. SISAK and MARK SCOLFORO, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: US officials to investigate labor and human rights abuses in Nicaragua
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — The Biden administration is opening an investigation into labor and human rights abuses in Nicaragua, impacting relations with a country the U.S. has a free trade deal with amid growing concerns over President Daniel Ortega’s increasingly authoritarian rule.
item.dc:creator: JOSHUA GOODMAN and JOSH BOAK, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Alaska Airlines will spread its wings by flying to Tokyo and Seoul beginning next year
item.description: Alaska Airlines said Tuesday it will start new service to Tokyo and Seoul next year as part of a plan to boost international flights over the next several years.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Geminids meteor shower peaks this weekend: How to watch
item.description: People across the globe could see up to 120 meteors per hour during the peak of the Geminids meteor shower this week.
item.dc:creator: Sam Kirk, WGN 9

item.title: McDonald's in Pennsylvania slammed with bad reviews after arrest of Luigi Mangione
item.description: A McDonald's in Altoona, Pennsylvania, is getting backlash online after an employee called 911, leading to the arrest of Luigi Mangione, the suspect in the killing of United Healthcare CEO Brian Thompson.
item.dc:creator: Bill Shannon, Fox 5

item.title: Top 12 holiday scams to watch out for, according to the BBB
item.description: The BBB has released a list of the top 12 holiday season scams, including Amazon Imposters, misleading social media ads, AI scams, gift exchange schemes, holiday apps, fake texts, gift card offers, temporary holiday jobs, look-alike websites, package delivery, porch pirates, and puppy scams.
item.dc:creator: Marisa Rodriguez, WGN 9

item.title: Congress races toward fast-approaching government shutdown deadline
item.description: Congress has just 10 days until government funding is set to run out, and lawmakers don’t have a deal to keep the lights on during the holidays. Members on both sides of the aisle expect the government will stay open past the Dec. 20 shutdown deadline.
item.dc:creator: Aris Folley, Fox 5

item.title: Family of suspect speaks out after his arrest in UnitedHealthcare CEO's murder
item.description: The family of Luigi Mangione, the 26-year-old man accused of killing UnitedHealthcare CEO Brian Thompson in New York City, has released a statement following his arrest on Monday.
item.dc:creator: Ben Mitchell, WGN 9

item.title: Auctioneer defends The Onion's bid for Infowars as Alex Jones tries stopping sale
item.description: An auction company executive involved in the liquidation of Alex Jones’ conspiracy theory platform Infowars testified for nearly five hours Monday, as a bankruptcy judge in Texas began a hearing into whether The Onion satirical news outlet was properly named the winning bidder over a company affilia
item.dc:creator: DAVE COLLINS, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: What we know about Luigi Mangione, the suspect arrested in UnitedHealthcare CEO killing
item.description: A man arrested in connection with the fatal shooting of UnitedHealthcare CEO Brian Thompson has been identified as Luigi Mangione, officials said Monday.
item.dc:creator: Lauren Cook, KTLA 5

item.title: Lara Trump stepping down from RNC amid Senate speculation
item.description: Lara Trump is stepping down as co-chair of the Republican National Committee (RNC) as she considers replacing Florida Sen. Marco Rubio (R), whom her father-in-law, President-elect Donald Trump, picked to be secretary of State.
item.dc:creator: Lauren Irwin, WGN 9

item.title: Gas prices drop to lowest in 3 years, AAA says
item.description: Good news for the millions of drivers on American roads: gas prices are falling. The national average for a gallon of gas has hit a three-year low, the American Automobile Association (AAA) recently announced.
item.dc:creator: Aaron Tolentino, WGN 9

item.title: Netflix must pay $385K to woman exposed as fertility doctor's secret child: court
item.description: A federal court in Indianapolis has ordered Netflix to pay $385,000 to an Indiana woman it outed as the daughter of Donald Cline, a former fertility doctor who secretly used his own sperm to inseminate patients.
item.dc:creator: Austin Hanson, WGN 9
